Descriptor AXI Monitor Packet Mask

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x24c
Size:
0x4
Source:
stream_regs.rdl

Description

Descriptor AXI monitor packet type filtering (16-bit mask)

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:16] RSVD r 0x0 -
[15:0] PKT_MASK rw 0xffff -

Field Descriptions

RSVD

Reserved

PKT_MASK

Packet type mask [15:0] - 1=enable, 0=disable
